结节病.title: Toward Precision in Pulmonary Sarcoidosis: Lessons From CT Phenotyping.
结节病.authors: Mathias KR, Sharp M
结节病.summary: 摘要缺失。

结节病.authors: Liu H, Abudalo R, Salahia G, Yusuf GT, Huang DY, Sidhu PS
结节病.summary: 睾丸结节病多参数超声表现为多发、双侧、低回声小病灶，血供少且质地中等或偏软。

结节病.title: Spectrum of Interstitial Lung Disease in Sarcoidosis.
结节病.authors: Al-Qaqaa R, Lazarus MS, Franco A
结节病.summary: 肺结节病可表现为多种间质性肺病模式，影响诊断和预后。

结节病.title: Comparative diagnostic performance of advanced endoscopic techniques in suspected sarcoidosis: A systematic review and network meta-analysis.
结节病.authors: Li SP, Luo Y, Liu XB, Zhang ZM, Bao Y
结节病.summary: EBUS-IFB和EBUS-TMC诊断疑似结节病的效能最高，优于传统TBLB等技术。

ILD.title: Changes in Interstitial Lung Disease Nomenclature.
ILD.authors: Wells AU, Rajan SK
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.summary: 抗MDA5皮肌炎患者中，高龄、男性、发热、皮肤溃疡及关节炎是快速进展性间质性肺病的预测因素。

ILD.title: Clinical features, pathogenesis, and treatment of anti-MDA5 antibody-positive interstitial lung disease.

ILD.summary: 抗MDA5抗体阳性间质性肺病预后差，三联疗法可改善结局，但部分患者仍难治疗。

ILD.summary: 系统性硬化症相关间质性肺病中，联合免疫抑制治疗（霉酚酸酯加生物制剂）对炎症性、进展性表型有效。

ILD.title: The evolving comorbidity landscape of rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Brooks RT, England BR, Kronzer VL, Crowson CS
ILD.summary: 近30年类风湿关节炎合并症谱系演变，间质性肺病及焦虑抑郁负担持续上升。

ILD.title: Interstitial lung disease in patients treated with antibody-drug conjugates: a review.

ILD.summary: 抗体药物偶联物相关间质性肺病发生率约10-15%，中位发病5-6个月，德曲妥珠单抗最典型，但非HER2靶点药物也有风险。

ILD.title: Associations of sarcopenia with the risk of incident respiratory disease and the role of inflammation and metabolism: a prospective cohort study.
